Beverlywood · 90035 · Beverly Hills Adjacent

Luxury Rental
Beverlywood

9432 & 9430 Oakmore Rd — a gated 5-bedroom compound with heated pool, guest house, and chef's kitchen. The defining luxury rental in the Beverly Hills corridor.

Schedule Showing View Property

What is a Luxury Rental in Beverlywood?

Beverlywood is an upscale residential neighborhood in Los Angeles (ZIP code 90035), immediately west of Beverly Hills and north of Pico Boulevard. Luxury rentals in Beverlywood are typically gated single-family homes priced at $15,000–$35,000/month, offering Beverly Hills-caliber amenities at a relative value compared to 90210 proper.

9432 & 9430 Oakmore Rd is the premier Beverlywood luxury rental available in 2026: a gated compound totaling 4,492 sq ft across a main residence and detached guest house, priced at $34,999/month fully furnished. The property features a heated pool and spa, steam sauna, chef's kitchen, EV charging, and smart home systems.

Beverlywood's central location places tenants within 5 minutes of Beverly Hills, 8 minutes of Century City and Fox Studios, 10 minutes of Cedars-Sinai, and 15 minutes of Santa Monica and SoFi Stadium — making it ideal for entertainment executives, medical professionals, and international visitors.

Luxury Rental Beverlywood — FAQ

What is the best luxury rental in Beverlywood? +

9432 & 9430 Oakmore Rd is a gated 5-bedroom, 4,492 sq ft compound with a heated pool, spa, guest house, and chef's kitchen — fully furnished at $34,999/month. It is the most comprehensively appointed luxury rental currently available in the Beverlywood / 90035 corridor.

What ZIP code is Beverlywood? +

Beverlywood is ZIP code 90035, Los Angeles, CA. It borders Beverly Hills to the east, Century City to the north, and Pico-Robertson to the south.

How much does a luxury rental in Beverlywood cost? +

Beverlywood luxury rentals range from $15,000 to $35,000/month. 9432 Oakmore Rd is priced at $34,999/month, fully furnished, for 4,492 sq ft including a detached guest house.

Is Beverlywood Beverly Hills adjacent? +

Yes. Beverlywood (90035) directly borders Beverly Hills and is commonly described as "Beverly Hills adjacent." Residents are typically 5 minutes from Beverly Drive and 8 minutes from Beverly Hills proper.
